🎶 OP 》„Ichi ni no San“ von Penthouse  

Auf der offiziellen Website gaben die Verantwortlichen den genauen Starttermin der vierten Staffel offiziell bekannt. Staffel 4 startet am 4. April im japanischen TV und wird über zwei aufeinanderfolgenden Cours ausgestrahlt. Die Boyband Penthouse wird den Opening-Song »Ichi ni no San« beisteuern. Crunchyroll kündigte bereits an die vierte Staffel im Simulcast zu zeigen.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Der 14-jährige Suzuki Iruma wird eines Tages gegen seinen Willen in die Welt der Dämonen verschleppt. Und als wenn das nicht genug wäre, ist sein in ihn vernarrter Besitzer und selbsternannter "Großvater" der Rektor seiner neuen Schule. Um zu überleben, muss Iruma sich mit einem überheblichen Mitschüler, der ihn zum Duell herausfordert, einem Mädchen mit Anpassungsstörung und vielen andere furchterregenden Geschöpfen auseinandersetzen! Ob unser ultimative Pazifist einen Weg finden, all den höllischen Geschossen ausweichen und seine Feinde mit seiner Freundlichkeit für sich gewinnen kann? (Crunchyroll)

»Ireneo Marchei« von Natsuki Hanae
»Eleonora Casciari« von Kaori Maeda
»Rosalia Pinotti« von Rumi Ōkubo

Mit einem neuen Trailer wurde der genaue Starttermin offiziell bekannt gegeben. Zudem wurden drei weitere Mitglieder des japanischen Sprechercast sowie der Ending-Song »DEAD OR LOVE«, der von Yoshino beigesteuert wird, offiziell vorgestellt. Der Anime startet am 1. April im japanischen TV.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Maria, die jüngste Tochter eines Herzogs, galt schon früh als großes Talent und wurde als Erbin der Familie erzogen, bis die Geburt ihres Bruders alles änderte. Um nicht als alte Jungfer zu enden, sucht sie verzweifelt nach einem Ehemann, doch alle geeigneten Adligen sind vergeben.  In der Hoffnung auf eine bessere Zukunft reist sie zum Studium ins Ausland. Doch plötzlich verkündet der Kronprinz, dass er ihre Verlobung auflöst, obwohl sie sich noch nie begegnet sind!  „Wie bitte?! Seit wann war ich verlobt?!“

record.text:
I‘m on Win11, but my 4070 laptop was 2023 juuuust before they started making Copilot PCs and doesn’t qualify for most of these genAI updates for Win11 as is. So I’m good for now 

As it is, I have offloaded non-gaming stuff to my iPad and MacMini just in case.
The folks behind making it difficult to get GPUs and RAM requiring NPUs for an operating system no one would even need yet (or would even have) does seem pretty implausible.

I don't think it has that sort of goodwill to burn, tbh. So I'd hope it wouldn't be a hard requirement, more like current "Copilot+ PCs," but also if it's true and that's an actual minimum spec, holy shit. Get me some popcorn.

Yeah I mean, Microsoft just pulled the "throw out your PC and buy a new one" card with Windows 11. So it does have that sort of hubris. But this would be on a completely different level.

Like, none of my PCs would meet the NPU requirements. And the oldest of those, I bought in 2024.

## How to Add ChatGPT to iPhone Keyboard: A Comprehensive Guide

Want to **_instantly_ access the power of ChatGPT** directly from your iPhone’s keyboard? This guide provides a simple, step-by-step walkthrough to integrate ChatGPT, streamlining your messaging, email, and note-taking.

### The Rise of AI Integration on Mobile Devices

The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into our daily lives is rapidly accelerating. ChatGPT, OpenAI’s powerful language model, has proven its utility in a vast range of tasks, from drafting emails to generating creative content. The demand for seamless access to AI on mobile devices, particularly on iPhones, is growing exponentially. Instead of switching between apps, users are looking for ways to invoke ChatGPT directly from the familiar interface of their keyboard. This integration represents a significant leap in mobile productivity and convenience.

### Benefits of Integrating ChatGPT with Your iPhone Keyboard

Integrating ChatGPT with your iPhone keyboard offers numerous advantages:

  * **Enhanced Productivity:** Generate text, translate languages, and summarize content without leaving your current app.
  * **Improved Communication:** Craft professional emails, write compelling social media posts, and polish your writing style on the fly.
  * **Creative Assistance:** Brainstorm ideas, write poems, or even generate song lyrics directly from your keyboard.
  * **Convenient Access:** No need to switch between apps – ChatGPT is always at your fingertips.
  * **Time Savings:** Automate repetitive writing tasks, freeing up your time for more important activities.



### Methods for Integrating ChatGPT into Your iPhone Keyboard

There are several methods to **add ChatGPT to iPhone keyboard** :

  1. **Using Third-Party Keyboard Apps:** Several apps available on the App Store offer built-in ChatGPT integration. These apps act as custom keyboards that allow you to directly access ChatGPT’s functionalities.
  2. **Using Shortcuts and API Keys:** With Apple’s Shortcuts app and an OpenAI API key, you can create custom keyboard actions to invoke ChatGPT. This method requires more technical expertise but offers greater customization.
  3. **Using Copy and Paste (Basic):** While not integrated, you can use the official ChatGPT app, copy its output, and paste it to where you need it, which is helpful if you don’t want to rely on third-party software.



### Step-by-Step Guide: Integrating with a Third-Party Keyboard App

This method is the simplest way to **add ChatGPT to iPhone keyboard**.

  1. **Choose a Keyboard App:** Research and select a keyboard app that offers ChatGPT integration from the App Store (e.g., “TypingMind”). Consider factors like user reviews, features, and pricing.
  2. **Download and Install the App:** Download the selected app from the App Store and install it on your iPhone.
  3. **Grant Keyboard Access:** Go to _Settings > General > Keyboard > Keyboards > Add New Keyboard_. Select the newly installed app. Then, enable “Allow Full Access.” _Be mindful of the privacy implications of granting full access to a keyboard app_.
  4. **Configure ChatGPT Settings:** Open the keyboard app and follow the instructions to connect it to your OpenAI account. This usually involves entering your OpenAI API key. You can obtain an API key from the OpenAI website after creating an account.
  5. **Start Using ChatGPT:** Open any app where you need to type (e.g., Messages, Email). Select the newly installed keyboard. You should now see a ChatGPT icon or button on the keyboard. Tap it to access ChatGPT’s features.
  6. **Prompt ChatGPT:** Type your prompt into the text field and send it to ChatGPT. The app will generate a response based on your prompt.
  7. **Insert Response:** Tap the generated response to insert it into your text field.



### Customizing the ChatGPT Keyboard Experience

Many keyboard apps offer customization options to tailor the ChatGPT experience to your preferences. These options may include:

  * **Adjusting the AI model:** Choosing between different ChatGPT models (e.g., GPT-3.5, GPT-4) based on your needs.
  * **Setting the tone and style:** Specifying the desired tone (e.g., professional, casual) and writing style (e.g., concise, detailed) for ChatGPT’s responses.
  * **Creating custom prompts:** Saving frequently used prompts for quick access.
  * **Defining shortcuts:** Assigning custom shortcuts to frequently used ChatGPT actions.



### Common Mistakes to Avoid

  * **Granting Full Access to Untrusted Apps:** Always research the app developer and read user reviews before granting full keyboard access.

Many people have pointed out that a lot of the viral comments were in fact posted by people posing as bots. But even the bot-written posts are ultimately the result of people pulling the strings, more puppetry than autonomy.
